_comment: Recorded cassette for Exa search API. SCRUBBED of the EXA_API_KEY before commit (x-api-key header is shown as [REDACTED]). Shape matches https://exa.ai/docs/reference/search as of 2026-04-15. Replayed by apps/api/src/adapters/signal/__tests__/exa.test.ts via fetch injection. Synthetic query: 'OpenAI company news' with numResults=2 and contents.text.maxCharacters=400.

results.title: OpenAI now values $850 bn after raising $122 bn
results.text: OpenAI now values $850 bn after raising $122 bn — coverage of the record AI funding round and the company's reported $2bn monthly revenues. Quoted analyst commentary on market position and competitive dynamics.

results.title: OpenAI raises USD $122 billion in record AI funding
results.author: Mark Tarre
results.text: OpenAI has raised USD $122 billion in committed capital, valuing the company at USD $852 billion after the investment.
